title: adrianwedd/spark
summary: SPARK — a Claude-powered robot companion for a neurodivergent kid. Built on SunFounder PiCar-X + Raspberry Pi.

title: raintreeloo/Gemma-Agents
summary: 🤖 Build versatile agents with Gemma to automate tasks and streamline workflows using cutting-edge FunctionGemma technology.

title: bluesliver/Graph-AI-Agent
summary: 🌐 Empower your AI experience with Graph-AI-Agent, a tool for synchronized knowledge management and interactive multi-agent collaboration.

title: Peuqui/AIfred-Intelligence
summary: 🤵 AIfred-Intelligence — self-hosted Multi-Agent Assistant with Debate Modes (Symposion/Tribunal), Voice (STT + Streaming-TTS), RAG with Long-Term Memory, Web Research and Tool-Calling. Reachable via Web-UI or Telegram/Discord/Email/EPIM. Multi-Backend: llama-swap, Ollama, vLLM, TabbyAPI.

title: hacker7221/ai-debates
summary: 🤖 Engage in real-time debates as AI personas clash on any topic, guided by a Moderator AI for a structured and dynamic discussion experience.

title: sterlp/eclipse-peon-ai
summary: An Eclipse plugin that supports offline and online LLMs/AIs with an integration into eclipse itself. Based on langchain4j including support for Ollama, LM Studio, Claude, Mistral, github copilot etc. Offline or online as we like.

title: ashokramcse/olla-nest
summary: Company ready local AI workspace built on Ollama Auto Router, admin controls, RBAC, audit trail, reports & analytics. Self-hosted, no cloud, no data leaves your network.

title: abalmasum785/proxmoxbar-macos
summary: 🖥️ Elevate your Proxmox VE experience on macOS with ProxmoxBar, a seamless menu bar companion for easy access and management.

title: Sungblab/opencairn-monorepo
summary: Self-hostable, multi-LLM knowledge OS for individuals and teams. Gemini/Ollama, knowledge graph, real-time collaboration, AGPLv3 + commercial license.

title: MelonS/MelonS-Agents
summary: Multi-skill AI assistant framework, agentskills.io spec compliant. Skill #1 music-video (60s 9:16 shorts, beat-aligned, genre-aware), Skill #2 job-hunt (30+ boards, LLM filter). v0.4.0 shipped. Orchestrator + 4 subagents + 3-layer reactive auditor.

title: HtooTayZa/Dispatch
summary: An event-driven, agentic AI pipeline built with Python, FastAPI, and LangGraph. Features local LLM inference via Ollama and webhook-based workflow orchestration.

title: eliasepro/groq-pdf-chat
summary: 📄 Chat with PDF files effortlessly using Groq PDF Chat; harness cloud speed and local processing for quick, cost-effective document interaction.

title: Dia1n1a/AI-Summarizer
summary: 🛠️ Summarize text, audio, and video content efficiently with our AI-powered multimodal system for quick, concise insights.

title: Retamoso23/ollixir
summary: 🤖 Enable local large language models with Ollixir, the Elixir client mirroring the ollama-python library for seamless chat, generation, and model management.

title: Toommo2/Text2CAD
summary: 🚀 Convert natural language to real CAD artifacts with Text2CAD, an agent-driven system for deterministic and validated engineering workflows.

title: AsadKhan05/WeChat-AI-Bot-Java-Python

title: Kenzzy69/rag-python-rag
summary: 📄 Simplify document search and Q&A with a complete RAG system, enabling smart retrieval and generation using local LLM models.

title: Clatr0/intent-sentiment-assistant
